HeroSection.subtitle: Accounting, invoicing, payroll and connectivity. 100% adapted to Venezuelan regulations.
HeroSection.tutorial_link: How to register? — View step-by-step tutorial

FeaturesSection.subtitle: Nine integrated modules within a single digital ecosystem built for the Venezuelan market.

features.title: VEN-NIF Accounting
features.description: Digital ledgers, RIPF, automated IVA, ISLR & IGTF filings stamped with SENIAT seal.

features.title: HR & Payroll
features.description: Payroll with SSO, FAOV, LPH, bonuses, benefits and LOPCYMAT. Full LOTTT compliance.

features.title: My Line 5G / eSIM
features.description: Physical and eSIM line provisioning, corporate fleet management, usage monitoring, and real-time telemetry.

features.title: Artificial Intelligence
features.description: Kyron AI built in (powered by Claude from Anthropic). Contract drafting, tax analysis, AI-powered pitches, waste classification, and more.

features.title: Legal AI & Permits
features.description: Automated contracts, notarial powers, CONATEL and SENIAT permits, and auto-updated Official Gazette.

features.title: Ameru — Eco-Credits
features.description: AI-driven waste classification, certified eco-credit issuance, and a sustainability marketplace.

features.title: Dashboard & Analytics
features.description: Live KPIs, cash-flow analysis, financial projections, and exportable PDF and PowerPoint reports.

features.title: Tax Management
features.description: IVA, ISLR, IGTF, parafiscal contributions, municipal taxes, withholdings, and an automated tax calendar.

features.title: Enterprise Security
features.description: Cryptographic sealing, an immutable audit trail, and AES-256 encryption across the entire platform.

ServicesSection.subtitle: Interconnected solutions covering accounting, invoicing, legal, telecommunications and artificial intelligence.

features.title: Accounting & Tax
features.subtitle: VEN-NIF · SENIAT · ISLR
features.description: Complete accounting system with legal books, Venezuelan chart of accounts, automatic IVA 16%, IGTF 3% and ISLR calculation. Compliant with the current Official Gazette.

features.title: AES-256 Security
features.subtitle: Military Encryption · JWT · Audit
features.description: Bank-grade security infrastructure. AES-256 encryption, JWT authentication with HTTP-only cookies, and an immutable log of every action.

features.title: Artificial Intelligence
features.subtitle: Kyron AI · Claude (Anthropic)
features.description: AI powered by Claude from Anthropic. Tax monitoring of the Official Gazette, smart accounting assistant, predictive cash-flow analysis, and automatic executive report generation.

ServicesSection.platform_subtitle: Venezuela's most robust infrastructure for comprehensive corporate management.

ComplianceSection.subtitle: System Kyron complies with all current Venezuelan regulations. Each module is designed to meet the requirements of regulatory entities.

seniat.full: National Integrated Customs and Tax Administration Service

ven_nif.full: International Financial Reporting Standards for Venezuela

ComplianceSection.security_desc: All infrastructure is protected with the highest security standards, comparable to international banking systems.

IntegrationsStrip.subtitle: We connect your company with national banks, telecom operators, payment gateways, and the most advanced artificial intelligence.

AboutUsSection.subtitle: Software engineering designed for operational excellence and full regulatory compliance.

FaqSection.subtitle: The most common questions about the System Kyron ecosystem.

items.question: How do you guarantee tax compliance?
items.answer: We monitor the Official Gazette with AI. IVA 16%, IGTF 3% and ISLR are calculated automatically according to current VEN-NIF regulations.

items.question: Can I manage multiple companies?
items.answer: Yes. The Partners portal lets you consolidate the accounting of multiple entities into a unified Command Center.

items.question: How does the BCV rate work?
items.answer: It updates automatically. Every invoice generates its USD equivalent with the current BCV rate.

items.question: Is it hard to migrate my data?
items.answer: No. For standard systems (Excel, Profit, Monica), migration is completed in less than 48 hours at no extra cost.

items.question: What level of security do you have?
items.answer: AES-256 encryption, JWT authentication with HTTP-only cookies, and an immutable audit log for every action.

HowItWorksSection.subtitle: From zero to productive in less than an hour. No consultants, no month-long implementations, no headaches.

steps.title: Register in Minutes
steps.description: Create your account with real ID or RIF verification via SAIME/SENIAT. No paperwork, no waiting.

steps.title: Set Up Your Company
steps.description: Select the modules you need. From accounting to HR, everything activates with one click.

steps.title: Operate with AI
steps.description: All 19 automations activate automatically. AI analyzes your documents, BCV rate syncs on its own.

steps.title: Comply and Grow
steps.description: Stay up to date with SENIAT, VEN-NIF and LOTTT automatically. Smart alerts notify you before deadlines.

WhyKyronSection.subtitle: We're not a generic ERP translated into Spanish. We are the first enterprise platform built exclusively for Venezuela's fiscal and labor reality.
WhyKyronSection.comparison_subtitle: A quick comparison of what sets us apart from international solutions

differentiators.title: 100% Venezuelan
differentiators.description: Built from scratch for Venezuelan regulations. SENIAT, BCV, LOTTT, VEN-NIF — not a generic ERP adapted, it's your local ecosystem.

differentiators.title: Triple Integrated AI
differentiators.description: Claude, OpenAI and Gemini working in parallel. Document forensic analysis, accounting assistant, and smart automations.

differentiators.title: Real AES-256 Encryption
differentiators.description: Not promises — verifiable military-grade encryption in real time. Sensitive data encrypted at rest, secure JWT, and immutable blockchain audit.

differentiators.title: 19 Automations
differentiators.description: Rules engine covering inventory, payroll, AR/AP, budgets, contracts, security and clients. Runs automatically — no human intervention.

differentiators.title: 9+ Native Modules
differentiators.description: Accounting, HR, Legal, Invoicing, Telecom, IT, Marketing, Personal and Enterprise. All connected, no third-party modules or additional costs.

differentiators.title: Real-Time BCV
differentiators.description: Automatic BCV rate synchronization. Your tax calculations, invoices and reports always up to date with the latest official rate.
